ast.name: error
ast.target: [Forge] 刷新库健康仪表板错误：

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Forge] 重新加载同步设置错误：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Writes vault-native docs into your Forge folder — command reference, schema guide, patch examples, and troubleshooting. Skips notes that already exist.
ast.target: 将原生 Vault 文档写入您的 Forge 文件夹——包括命令参考、架构指南、补丁示例和故障排除。已存在的笔记将被跳过。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on bottom-of-note dataview expansion blocks.
ast.target: 启用笔记底部的 Dataview 扩展块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Current session only. Off disables automatic refresh. Edit idle waits after typing stops and also refreshes when you leave the note.
ast.target: 仅限当前会话。关闭将禁用自动刷新。编辑空闲等待时间是指停止输入后的等待时间，离开笔记时也会刷新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long forge waits after typing stops before refreshing the current note's dataview expansion.
ast.target: 停止输入后，Forge 刷新当前笔记 Dataview 扩展的等待时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Title shown in the collapsed block appended to the end of the note.
ast.target: 附加在笔记末尾的折叠块中显示的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of links written to the block. Use 0 for no limit.
ast.target: 写入块的最大链接数。使用 0 表示无限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace the field order with required + optional fields from schema.md, in the order they appear in the schema.
ast.target: 使用 schema.md 中的必填和可选字段替换字段顺序，按其在架构中出现的顺序排列。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of lint run notes to keep.
ast.target: 保留的 lint 运行笔记数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wrap file paths in [[wikilinks]] in lint run notes so you can navigate directly to affected files.
ast.target: 在 lint 运行笔记中将文件路径包装在 [[wikilinks]] 中，以便直接导航到受影响的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check inline metadata (key:: Value patterns) against the schema. Disable to skip all inline metadata rules.
ast.target: 根据架构检查内联元数据（key:: Value 模式）。禁用可跳过所有内联元数据规则。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip notes in the configured inbox folder during vault lint so draft notes can stay incomplete while they are still being worked out.
ast.target: 在 Vault lint 期间跳过已配置收件箱文件夹中的笔记，以便草稿笔记在仍在处理时可以保持不完整。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When to show the open vault repair button after a lint run.
ast.target: 在 lint 运行后何时显示打开 Vault 修复按钮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Turn on background note linting. Forge waits 10 seconds after typing stops, and also lints when you leave the note or switch that note into reading view.
ast.target: 启用后台笔记 lint。Forge 在停止输入后等待 10 秒，并在您离开笔记或切换到阅读视图时进行 lint。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long forge waits after typing stops before linting just the active note.
ast.target: 停止输入后，Forge 对当前活动笔记进行 lint 的等待时间。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Flag notes whose review cycle has elapsed, based on frontmatter field values.
ast.target: 根据前置字段值标记审查周期已过的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a backup of each modified file before applying a patch.
ast.target: 在应用补丁前创建每个修改文件的备份。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write a manifest file alongside each patch run so you can restore a full patch run in one step. Only active when backups are enabled.
ast.target: 在每次补丁运行时写入清单文件，以便您可以一步恢复整个补丁运行。仅在启用备份时有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically run vault lint after a patch is applied.
ast.target: 应用补丁后自动运行 Vault lint。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically run vault maintenance after a patch is applied.
ast.target: 应用补丁后自动运行 Vault 维护。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete patch backup files older than this many days.
ast.target: 删除超过此天数的补丁备份文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Age threshold used for stale inbox handling.
ast.target: 用于处理陈旧收件箱的年龄阈值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose whether stale inbox notes are deleted during maintenance or reported as lint warnings.
ast.target: 选择陈旧收件箱笔记是在维护期间删除还是作为 lint 警告报告。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Trim lint history entries older than this many days.
ast.target: 修剪超过此天数的 lint 历史记录条目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hard cap on the number of lint history entries to retain.
ast.target: 保留的 lint 历史记录条目的硬性上限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run vault maintenance silently whenever the vault health dashboard is refreshed.
ast.target: 每当刷新 Vault 健康仪表板时，静默运行 Vault 维护。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of patch report notes to keep.
ast.target: 保留的补丁报告笔记数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of shape lint run notes to keep.
ast.target: 保留的形状 lint 运行笔记数量。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables vault inventory, meta, and ontology export commands.
ast.target: 启用 Vault 清单、元数据和本体导出命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Builds vault-inventory.json, vault-meta.json, and vault-export.md in one pass. Inventory is schema-optional; meta requires schema and excludes ai_private notes.
ast.target: 一次性构建 vault-inventory.json、vault-meta.json 和 vault-export.md。清单是架构可选的；元数据需要架构并排除 ai_private 笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Builds per-type relationship indexes using the inventory and the filter settings below. Runs inventory export first if no inventory file is on disk.
ast.target: 使用清单和下面的过滤器设置构建按类型的关系索引。如果磁盘上没有清单文件，则先运行清单导出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Filename for the dataview dashboard note created on first export run. Leave blank to use 'vault-dashboard'.
ast.target: 首次导出运行时创建的 Dataview 仪表板笔记的文件名。留空则使用 'vault-dashboard'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, notes marked as private are counted separately in the overview and excluded from vault-meta.json.
ast.target: 启用后，标记为私有的笔记在概览中单独计数，并从 vault-meta.json 中排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Refresh field and value lists from the current schema.
ast.target: 从当前架构刷新字段和值列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The top-level heading under which relationship links are organised in your notes. Enter without the # — e.g. 'Related'. Subheadings under this heading become relationship keys.
ast.target: 笔记中组织关系链接的顶级标题。输入时不带 #——例如 'Related'。此标题下的子标题成为关系键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add folders to exclude from ontology indexing.
ast.target: 添加要从本体索引中排除的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables shape note processing and template refinement.
ast.target: 启用形状笔记处理和模板优化。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, shape notes in subfolders of the shapes folder are included in refinement, lint, and repair. Off by default to preserve existing behavior.
ast.target: 启用后，形状文件夹子文件夹中的形状笔记将包含在优化、lint 和修复中。默认关闭以保留现有行为。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the refine shape templates command to create and update template notes.
ast.target: 允许优化形状模板命令创建和更新模板笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, refinement injects relationship headings into templates based on schema.ontology.relationships. Only relationships where the shape type participates as a source (or flexible member) are included.
ast.target: 启用后，优化会根据 schema.ontology.relationships 将关系标题注入模板。仅包含形状类型作为源（或灵活成员）参与的关系。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The heading under which relationship subheadings are grouped.
ast.target: 关系子标题分组的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Heading level for the parent relationship heading. Subheadings are always one level below.
ast.target: 父关系标题的标题级别。子标题始终低一级。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Inject: add missing headings under the existing parent heading in the structure. Falls back to append if the parent heading is not found. Append: always add the relationship section at the end of the template.
ast.target: 注入：在现有父标题下的结构中添加缺失的标题。如果未找到父标题，则回退到附加。附加：始终在模板末尾添加关系部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Process all shape notes and write or update template notes now.
ast.target: 立即处理所有形状笔记并写入或更新模板笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Checks that notes matching a shape have all required headings, in the correct order, with no empty sections.
ast.target: 检查匹配形状的笔记是否具有所有必需的标题，顺序正确，且没有空节。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also flag headings that are not defined in the matching shape template. When off, Shape Lint checks required template headings and heading levels, but ignores extra headings.
ast.target: 同时标记在匹配形状模板中未定义的标题。关闭时，形状 lint 检查必需的模板标题和标题级别，但忽略额外的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip notes in the configured inbox folder during shape lint so draft structures can evolve before heading rules are enforced.
ast.target: 在形状 lint 期间跳过已配置收件箱文件夹中的笔记，以便草稿结构在强制执行标题规则之前可以演变。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Validate all notes in the vault, or limit to selected folders only.
ast.target: 验证 Vault 中的所有笔记，或仅限选定的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only notes in these folders will be evaluated for shape heading validation.
ast.target: 仅这些文件夹中的笔记将被评估以进行形状标题验证。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the run shape repair command to modify notes.
ast.target: 允许运行形状修复命令修改笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Repair all notes in the vault, or limit to selected folders only.
ast.target: 修复 Vault 中的所有笔记，或仅限选定的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes in these folders will be evaluated for shape repair.
ast.target: 这些文件夹中的笔记将被评估以进行形状修复。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Wrap file paths in [[wikilinks]] in repair run notes so you can navigate directly to affected files.
ast.target: 在修复运行笔记中将文件路径包装在 [[wikilinks]] 中，以便直接导航到受影响的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of repair run entries to keep in shape-repair-history.json.
ast.target: 在 shape-repair-history.json 中保留的最大修复运行条目数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add missing headings and reorder sections to match templates now.
ast.target: 立即添加缺失的标题并重新排序部分以匹配模板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The schema field that receives the shape name when a template is generated. Load schema to populate this dropdown.
ast.target: 生成模板时接收形状名称的架构字段。加载架构以填充此下拉列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where the schema version is stored — inline metadata (key:: Value) or frontmatter.
ast.target: 存储架构版本的位置——内联元数据（key:: Value）或前置数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder path currently referenced in dataview queries.
ast.target: Dataview 查询中当前引用的文件夹路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limit scanning to a subfolder. Leave empty to scan the entire vault.
ast.target: 限制扫描到子文件夹。留空以扫描整个 Vault。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 仪表板刷新时自动运行

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 形状 lint 运行保留

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Choose a patch note or YAML file...
ast.target: 选择补丁说明或 YAML 文件...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] schema.md is missing valid YAML frontmatter
ast.target: [Forge] schema.md 缺少有效的 YAML 前置内容

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not parse schema contract YAML:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法解析架构契约 YAML：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Ignoring malformed dashboard operational_history cache leaf.
ast.target: [Forge] 忽略格式错误的仪表板 operational_history 缓存叶。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard lint cache:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板检查缓存：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard schema cache:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板架构缓存：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard ontology cache:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板本体缓存：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard shape lint cache:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板形状检查缓存：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard patch history cache:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板补丁历史缓存：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not update dashboard operational history:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法更新仪表板操作历史：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [Forge] Could not preload health dashboard panel:
ast.target: [Forge] 无法预加载健康仪表板面板：

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [Forge] 无法重新组合健康仪表板：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Shapes is not enabled. Enable it in settings → shapes.
ast.target: Forge：形状功能未启用。请在设置 → 形状中启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Template refinement is not enabled. Enable it in settings → shapes.
ast.target: Forge：模板精炼未启用。请在设置 → 形状中启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Forge：正在运行形状模板精炼…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Shape repair is not enabled. Enable it in settings → shapes.
ast.target: Forge：形状修复未启用。请在设置 → 形状中启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Shape repair scope is set to 'folder' but no folders are selected.
ast.target: Forge：形状修复范围设置为“文件夹”，但未选择任何文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Export is not enabled — enable it in settings → export.
ast.target: Forge：导出功能未启用 — 请在设置 → 导出中启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No filter configured — set a field and values in settings → export.
ast.target: Forge：未配置筛选器 — 请在设置 → 导出中设置字段和值。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No inventory found — running export inventory first…
ast.target: Forge：未找到清单 — 正在先运行导出清单…

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Inventory export failed — ontology export aborted.
ast.target: Forge：清单导出失败 — 本体导出中止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Could not load schema — is schema.md present?
ast.target: Forge：无法加载架构 — schema.md 文件是否存在？

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Nothing to clean up — vault is within retention policy.
ast.target: Forge：无需清理 — 保险库符合保留策略。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Could not open upgrade guide.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No lint report found. Run vault lint first.
ast.target: Forge：未找到检查报告。请先运行保险库检查。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Could not load schema.md — repair aborted.
ast.target: Forge：无法加载 schema.md — 修复中止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Repair patch written. Run apply vault patch when ready.
ast.target: Forge：修复补丁已写入。准备好后运行应用保险库补丁。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Overwriting existing patch file — previous operations will be replaced.
ast.target: Forge：正在覆盖现有补丁文件 — 之前的替换操作将被替换。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Could not load schema.md — lint aborted. Run Validate Schema to diagnose.
ast.target: Forge：无法加载 schema.md — 检查中止。请运行验证架构以进行诊断。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Patch file has no operations.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: All tags already normalized — no changes needed.
ast.target: Forge：所有标签均已规范化 — 无需更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: All frontmatter already normalized — no changes needed.
ast.target: Forge：所有前置内容均已规范化 — 无需更改。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No patch manifests found. Apply a patch with restore manifests enabled first.
ast.target: Forge：未找到补丁清单。请先应用一个启用了恢复清单的补丁。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Could not read any patch manifests.
ast.target: Forge：无法读取任何补丁清单。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Both folder paths are required.
ast.target: Forge：两个文件夹路径都是必需的。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Current and new folder paths are the same.
ast.target: Forge：当前和新文件夹路径相同。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Shape lint is disabled in settings.
ast.target: Forge：形状检查在设置中被禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Dataview must be installed and enabled to use dataview expansion.
ast.target: Forge：必须安装并启用 Dataview 才能使用 Dataview 展开功能。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Open a Markdown note first.
ast.target: Forge：请先打开一个 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Forge：已移除 Dataview 展开块。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Dataview expansion already up to date.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: Forge：保险库健康仪表板已刷新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Patch history refreshed in the dashboard.
ast.target: Forge：仪表盘中的补丁历史记录已刷新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: No operational runs have been recorded yet.
ast.target: Forge：尚未记录任何操作运行。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Forge: Could not open settings from this Obsidian version.
ast.target: Forge：无法从此 Obsidian 版本打开设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Repair pass — interactive fix of lint errors
ast.target: 修复通过 — 交互式修复 lint 错误

ast.name: detail
ast.source: Backup folder does not exist yet

ast.name: detail
ast.source: Inbox retention is configured to report stale notes as lint warnings
ast.target: 收件箱保留策略已配置为将过时笔记报告为 lint 警告

ast.name: message
ast.source: schema.md is missing YAML frontmatter block
ast.target: schema.md 缺少 YAML frontmatter 块

ast.name: message
ast.source: schema.md frontmatter could not be parsed for version check
ast.target: 无法解析 schema.md 的 frontmatter 以进行版本检查

ast.name: message
ast.source: tag_rules.forbidden_namespaces must be a list if present
ast.target: tag_rules.forbidden_namespaces 如果存在则必须是一个列表

ast.name: name
ast.target: 重命名 dataview 文件夹

ast.name: name
ast.source: Refresh dataview expansion in current folder
ast.target: 刷新当前文件夹中的 dataview 展开

ast.name: name
ast.source: Refresh dataview expansion in whole vault
ast.target: 刷新整个仓库中的 dataview 展开

ast.name: text
ast.source: Each file below was backed up before repair. Restoring replaces the current note content with the pre-repair backup. This cannot be undone.
ast.target: 以下每个文件在修复前都已备份。恢复操作会将当前笔记内容替换为修复前的备份。此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All paths are relative to your vault root.
ast.target: 所有路径均相对于您的仓库根目录。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Collects link results from every dataview block in a note and writes one collapsed compatibility block at the bottom for graph view and raw-Markdown readers.
ast.target: 收集笔记中每个 dataview 块的链接结果，并在底部写入一个折叠的兼容性块，供图谱视图和原始 Markdown 阅读器使用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Dataview expansion is unavailable because the dataview plugin is not installed or not enabled.
ast.target: Dataview 展开不可用，因为 dataview 插件未安装或未启用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Fields are written in this order when Forge modifies a note. Fields not listed here are appended alphabetically. Use 'Prefill from schema' to seed this list from your schema.md, or add fields manually. Drag to reorder, × to remove.
ast.target: 当 Forge 修改笔记时，字段将按此顺序写入。此处未列出的字段将按字母顺序追加。使用“从 schema 预填充”可从您的 schema.md 中生成此列表，或手动添加字段。拖动以重新排序，× 以移除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select which notes are included in the ontology export by choosing a schema field and the values to match.
ast.target: 通过选择一个 schema 字段及其要匹配的值，来选择哪些笔记包含在本体导出中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Notes inside these folders are skipped during ontology export. Applies at any depth — add a top-level folder to exclude everything under it.
ast.target: 这些文件夹内的笔记在本体导出时会被跳过。适用于任何深度——添加一个顶级文件夹即可排除其下的所有内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure which schema fields appear in generated templates and what value each gets. The type target field and configured date fields are excluded — they are set automatically at runtime.
ast.target: 配置哪些 schema 字段出现在生成的模板中，以及每个字段获得的值。类型目标字段和已配置的日期字段会被排除——它们会在运行时自动设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When enabled, the 'Refine Shape Templates' command reads each shape note and writes or updates the corresponding template note.
ast.target: 启用后，“优化形状模板”命令会读取每个形状笔记，并写入或更新相应的模板笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When enabled, lint runs validate note heading structure against the corresponding shape template. Severity follows the Lint tab strict mode setting.
ast.target: 启用后，lint 运行会根据相应的形状模板验证笔记的标题结构。严重性遵循 Lint 选项卡的严格模式设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When enabled, the 'Run Shape Repair' command corrects heading drift in notes by adding missing headings and reordering sections to match the template. No content is ever deleted. A backup is written before each file is modified.
ast.target: 启用后，“运行形状修复”命令会通过添加缺失的标题和重新排序章节以匹配模板来修正笔记中的标题漂移。内容永远不会被删除。在修改每个文件之前都会写入备份。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Could not load schema. Ensure schema.md exists and is valid.
ast.target: 无法加载 schema。请确保 schema.md 存在且有效。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No configurable fields found in schema.
ast.target: 在 schema 中未找到可配置的字段。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 无缓存的健康状况快照

ast.name: text
ast.source: Run a manual refresh to scan the vault and populate this dashboard.
ast.target: 运行手动刷新以扫描保险库并填充此仪表板。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Settings changed on another device. Reload to apply the synced changes.
ast.target: 设置已在另一台设备上更改。重新加载以应用同步的更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open a markdown note to see its active lint status here.
ast.target: 打开一个 Markdown 笔记以在此处查看其活动 lint 状态。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Active-file auto-lint is turned off in settings.
ast.target: 活动文件自动 lint 在设置中已关闭。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 正在对当前笔记进行 lint 检查。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Current note has changes waiting for the next auto-lint run.
ast.target: 当前笔记有更改正在等待下一次自动 lint 运行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Current note has not been linted yet in this session.
ast.target: 当前笔记在本次会话中尚未进行 lint 检查。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No issues found for the current note.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Schema has not been validated in the latest dashboard cache.
ast.target: Schema 尚未在最新的仪表板缓存中验证。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No active lint issues in the latest snapshot.
ast.target: 最新的快照中没有活动的 lint 问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Ontology metrics have not been collected yet.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Shape lint has not been run yet.
ast.target: 形状 lint 尚未运行。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 未发现形状 lint 问题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No maintenance history has been read yet.
ast.target: 尚未读取任何维护历史记录。

ast.name: text
ast.target: Forge 1.0.0 — 需要 Schema 迁移

ast.name: text
ast.source: Forge 1.0.0 introduces a new schema contract structure. Your existing schema.md must be updated before running Vault Lint or Validate Schema.
ast.target: Forge 1.0.0 引入了新的 schema 契约结构。在运行保险库 lint 或验证 schema 之前，必须更新您现有的 schema.md。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The schema structure has changed as follows:

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you use stale review, add values_meta to your review_cycle field to declare day counts — the internal hardcoded map has been removed.
ast.target: 如果您使用陈旧审查，请将 values_meta 添加到您的 review_cycle 字段以声明天数——内部硬编码映射已被移除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: See the upgrade guide for the full migration steps and a complete before/after example.
ast.target: 请参阅升级指南以获取完整的迁移步骤和完整的前后示例。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No operations collected — nothing to patch.
ast.target: 未收集到任何操作——无需修补。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 查看 lint 运行笔记

ast.name: text
ast.source: Errors will not be applied. You can still proceed with the successful operations.
ast.target: 错误将不会被应用。您仍然可以继续进行成功的操作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No changes needed — vault already matches the patch.
ast.target: 无需更改——保险库已与补丁匹配。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Operation-level restore data will be written for this patch run.
ast.target: 将为此补丁运行写入操作级恢复数据。

ast.name: text
ast.source: schema.md is well-formed. All required sections are present and parseable.
ast.target: schema.md 格式良好。所有必需的部分都存在且可解析。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Backups will be written to system/forge/patches/backups/
ast.target: 备份将写入 system/forge/patches/backups/ 目录。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select a patch run. Newer manifests can restore selected operations without overwriting later edits.
ast.target: 选择一个补丁运行。较新的清单可以在不覆盖后续编辑的情况下恢复选定的操作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This older manifest does not contain operation data. Restore will overwrite current files with backup content.
ast.target: 此旧版清单不包含操作数据。恢复将用备份内容覆盖当前文件。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重命名 dataview 文件夹

ast.name: text
ast.source: Updates folder path references inside dataview blocks only. Lines outside dataview blocks are never touched.
ast.target: 仅更新 dataview 块内的文件夹路径引用。dataview 块外的行永远不会被修改。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重命名 dataview 文件夹 — 确认

ast.name: text
ast.target: 查看形状 lint 运行笔记
